general_warnings: Confirm the exact module variant before using header GPIOs reserved for on-module memory.
Review each listed caution before wiring a board-header GPIO.

power: The board can be powered from USB or the 5V Input connector, with JP7 selecting the source.
The Power Switch toggles the board on and off.
programming: FT2232HL provides USB-to-serial on channel B and USB-to-JTAG on channel A.
JP2 enables the JTAG or UART jumper routing, and JP14 enables RTS/CTS flow control.
onboard_hardware: LCD screen, microSD card slot, OV7670 camera connector, RGB LED, 32.768 kHz crystal, FT2232HL USB bridge, Boot button, EN button, power selector, power switch, 5V input, 5V power LED, and 0R current-shunt placeholder.
